'''dhagala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidilin|cnidilin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidilin|cnidilin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhagala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægælæth|dhægælæth]] || [[word:dhægælæj|dhægælæj]] || [[word:dhægælæsh|dhægælæsh]] || [[word:dhægælæ|dhægælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagagalath|dhagagalath]] || [[word:dhagagalaj|dhagagalaj]] || [[word:dhagagalash|dhagagalash]] || [[word:dhagagala|dhagagala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagalath|dhagalath]] || [[word:dhagalaj|dhagalaj]] || [[word:dhagalash|dhagalash]] || [[word:dhagala|dhagala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagaflath|dhagaflath]] || [[word:dhagaflaj|dhagaflaj]] || [[word:dhagaflash|dhagaflash]] || [[word:dhagaflaf|dhagaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagalatha|dhagalatha]] || [[word:dhagalaja|dhagalaja]] || [[word:dhagalasha|dhagalasha]] || [[word:dhagalaka|dhagalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagalath|dhagalath]] || [[word:dhagalaj|dhagalaj]] || [[word:dhagalash|dhagalash]] || [[word:dhagala|dhagala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagalathal|dhagalathal]] || [[word:dhagalajal|dhagalajal]] || [[word:dhagalashal|dhagalashal]] || [[word:dhagalakal|dhagalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagalathatha|dhagalathatha]] || [[word:dhagalajaja|dhagalajaja]] || [[word:dhagalashasha|dhagalashasha]] || [[word:dhagalaka|dhagalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagalathan|dhagalathan]] || [[word:dhagalajan|dhagalajan]] || [[word:dhagalashan|dhagalashan]] || [[word:dhagalakan|dhagalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagalathaoro|dhagalathaoro]] || [[word:dhagalajaoro|dhagalajaoro]] || [[word:dhagalashaoro|dhagalashaoro]] || [[word:dhagalakaoro|dhagalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
